overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring neon-lit outdoor seating areas with reflective wet tiles, modern glass architecture, and NPCs relaxing under glowing purple canopies. The scene transitions from a covered seating area to an open plaza with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway with concrete bench seating on the left, passing seated NPCs. The wet reflective tiles mirror the purple neon glow from the canopy structures ahead, while modern glass buildings rise in the background.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the futuristic outdoor lounge area filled with pod chairs featuring glowing bases and low concrete tables. The space is densely populated with seated patrons under the purple neon canopies, creating an intimate cyberpunk atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the covered seating area toward the open plaza, with the purple canopy receding into the background. The view opens to reveal towering skyscrapers and a large red digital billboard in the distance, while palm trees mark the edge of the open space.

segments.scene_description: Walking across the expansive open plaza with unobstructed views of the Night City skyline. The wet tiles reflect the ambient city glow and distant neon signs, while scattered pedestrians move through the space and the large red digital billboard dominates the left side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an intimate, neon-lit pedestrian walkway into a vast, open cyberpunk plaza. It begins by gliding along a covered path where wet reflective tiles mirror the purple glow of overhead canopies and modern glass buildings rise in the background. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a futuristic lounge area densely populated with patrons relaxing in glowing pod chairs and around low concrete tables. The view then expands as the purple canopies recede, passing by palm trees that mark the transition toward a wide-open urban space. Finally, the camera emerges into the expansive plaza, where the wet ground reflects the ambient city glow and a massive red digital billboard dominates the skyline of towering skyscrapers.
